name: io.github.Servosity/skykick-mcp
title: SkyKick MCP
description: Fleet backup posture, stale snapshots, and coverage gaps for SkyKick Cloud Backup.

environmentVariables.name: SKYKICK_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Set the SKYKICK_CLIENT_ID credential for the SkyKick MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: SKYKICK_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Set the SKYKICK_CLIENT_SECRET credential for the SkyKick MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: SKYKICK_OAUTH_SCOPE
environmentVariables.description: Optional OAuth scope override for the SkyKick MCP server. Defaults to 'Partner' when unset.
